message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has "question" field with value "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" respectively. Provide feedback and boolean complies.

We analyze text: "DARBA STRUKTŪRA Diploms darbs ir strukturēts šādi: 1.nodaļa iepazīstina ar kredītriska prognozēšanu. (nepabeigts)". It's very short. It lists only one chapter. So for question 1: Does the text list the main sections? No, only one. So fails. Provide feedback: "Only one section listed, missing rest." Complies false.

Question 2: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? Only one section described. Not enough. So fails. Provide feedback: "Only one section described, no description of other sections." Complies false.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure? No, because only one section. So fails. Provide feedback: "Structure unclear, missing outline." Complies false.

Return JSON array.
